subject: Two merfolk figures underwater in a tense face-to-face confrontation
description: Two merfolk face each other in a murky underwater scene. The figure on the left has long, vivid red hair and dark blue-purple scaled coloration, reaching a clawed hand toward the other. The figure on the right has lighter hair and wears a flowing golden-yellow garment, pulling back with hands raised in a warding or pleading gesture. Both have pointed ears. Bubbles float upward between them. A stone architectural column is visible in the background, suggesting a submerged ruin or structure. The overall palette is aquatic teal-green with warm amber from the right figure's clothing creating a visual contrast. The body language reads as one figure threatening or confronting the other.
foreground: two merfolk figures, one dark-scaled reaching forward, one light-clothed pulling back
background: murky teal underwater, submerged stone column
emotion: left figure: aggressive, reaching; right figure: fearful, retreating
